title: pseudocapsicum torulosum
intro: Pseudocapsicum torulosum is a plant species within the Solanaceae family, although the classification for this plant is disputed, with some sources considering it to be a synonym of Capsicum torulosum, a type of pepper. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pseudocapsicum torulosum include its potential in treating pain, reducing inflammation, and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine.
